rules.rule_text:
rule mal_BotnetFenix_Payload
{
	meta:
		author = "RussianPanda"
		description = "Detects BotnetFenix payload"
		date = "2/2/2024"
		hash = "65a9575c50a96d04a3f649fe0f6b8ccd"

	strings:
		$s1 = "tasks_register"
		$s2 = "actionget_action"
		$s3 = "Post Success"
		$s4 = "Success Stealer"
		$s5 = "Download and Execute task id"
		$a = "_CorExeMain"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and 4 of ( $s* ) and $a
}
